quizzes.q: Which guardian proves you are who you claim, before you pass?
quizzes.why: Identification and Authentication proves who you are before you're let in.

quizzes.q: 'Only the access you truly need' is which control?
quizzes.why: AC-6, Least Privilege, grants only the access someone truly needs — nothing more.

quizzes.q: An intruder tailgates through a propped door into the server room. Which family should stop it?
quizzes.why: Physical and Environmental Protection stops tailgating into the room itself.
